name: bold_claim_proof
example: This converts at 14%. Here's the page.

name: contrarian
formula: Everyone tells you to [X]. That's why you're [bad outcome].
example: Everyone says hustle harder. That's why you're broke.

name: curiosity_gap
formula: If you don't know [X], you're losing [Y].
example: If you don't know this caption rule, you're losing 60% of your reach.

name: specific_number
example: $4,200 in 30 days. Here's the exact playbook.

name: identity_promise
formula: If you're [X], this is for you.
example: If you're a creator under 10K, watch this.

name: question_provocative
example: Did you know Reels under 30s outperform longer ones for new audiences?

name: direct_address
example: Stop scrolling if you want to double your reach this week.

name: story_tease
formula: Here's what happened when I [X] for [time].
example: Here's what happened when I posted at 3am for 30 days.

name: controversial_opener
example: Most B2B marketing teams waste 60% of their video budget.

name: secret_reveal
example: The pricing rule nobody talks about.

name: wait_for_it
example: Watch what happens when the payoff finally hits.
